response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience as a Senior/Staff Software Engineer at top-tier companies (Google, Meta) and demonstrates strong fullstack development skills with TypeScript, React, and Node.js. However, his recent role at Google and high seniority level may make him overqualified for a junior/mid-level position, and his lack of recent PostgreSQL/Nest.js experience is a concern. His background in renewable energy (GISCollective) and clean architecture aligns well with the role's goals.
strengths: Extensive fullstack experience (TypeScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB, AWS) at leading tech companies
Strong background in clean architecture, test-driven development, and scalable systems
Proven interest in renewable energy/green tech (GISCollective platform)
concerns: Recent roles at Google/Meta suggest potential overqualification for a junior/mid-level position
Limited recent experience with PostgreSQL and Nest.js (key requirements)
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with remote-friendly roles he’s accustomed to
